chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7773 of 2022 CP D 4730 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 20.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that these petitions be disposed of with directions to the respondent 1 to decide representation of the petitioners expeditiously preferably within 30 days, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners. It is also stated that the pending aforesaid, no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioners. Order accordingly. Both the petitions are disposed of as jointly sought aforesaid. Office is directed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
